title: Aegis AI Governance & Readiness
summary: AI readiness and governance workstream for assessment, risk registers, human-review gates, audit evidence, monitoring, and deployable AI adoption controls.
business_hook: Aegis helps compliance-sensitive teams move from vague AI ambition to measurable readiness, controlled pilots, and evidence-backed governance.

title: Public Infrastructure Copilot
summary: GovTech planning engine that converts maintenance records and service requests into ranked infrastructure priorities.
business_hook: Designed for municipalities that need faster capital planning, clearer prioritization, and evidence-backed infrastructure allocation.

title: Compliance Twin
summary: A control-system graph for teams managing obligations, evidence, and assurance workflows across regulated environments.
business_hook: Compliance Twin replaces spreadsheet governance with a persistent operating graph for mid-market compliance teams.

title: Operator Memory Cloud
summary: Shared execution memory for startup teams that need durable access to decisions, context, and workflow history.
business_hook: The product compounds execution velocity by reducing repeated context transfer and lost institutional knowledge.

title: Civic Procurement Graph
summary: Procurement intelligence layer for agencies and vendors navigating fragmented public bids, contracts, and supplier histories.
business_hook: Creates recurring workflow value by making public procurement discovery and supplier intelligence searchable and actionable.

title: Research Commercialization Studio
summary: Commercialization workflow for translating academic and lab research into venture briefs, prototype plans, and market tests.
business_hook: Built for innovation offices and technical founders who need a clearer path from research output to startup narrative.

title: Visual Overlay AI for Shopping, Grooming, and Guided Personal Interfaces
summary: R&D concept for a reusable personal visual model that could support try-on, grooming previews, and guided overlay interfaces.
business_hook: Explores a personal visual interface layer between commerce, self-presentation, instruction, and service experiences.

title: Ad Delivery Systems and Platform-Controlled Entertainment Economies
summary: Systems research into how recommendation, modular entertainment, personalization, and ad orchestration could reshape media monetization.
business_hook: Maps the commercial opportunity and responsibility risks of platform-led attention infrastructure.

title: Career Simulation and Pathway Exploration Platform
summary: Immersive career-path simulation that helps people experience realistic workflows, pressures, skill expectations, and tradeoffs before committing to education or career moves.
business_hook: Supports education, reskilling, workforce readiness, and enterprise talent pipelines by making career decisions experiential instead of brochure-driven.

title: Experience-Based Entertainment and Media Worlds
summary: Participatory media environments that extend movies, shows, creator ecosystems, and digital formats into interactive worlds with choices, tensions, and structured user involvement.
business_hook: Creates premium engagement, platform retention, creator-economy, and branded-entertainment opportunities beyond passive viewing.

title: Text-to-AR Utility Systems
summary: Converts ordinary text-based information into contextual spatial interfaces for restaurants, venues, training, games, and guided real-world environments.
business_hook: Treats AR as a workflow and content-layer opportunity rather than a hardware-only bet.

title: Senior-Focused AI Phone Co-Pilot
summary: Accessible AI assistance layer for older adults navigating smartphones and digital tasks through patient, contextual, step-by-step guidance.
business_hook: Addresses a persistent high-friction consumer and accessibility problem that generic help documentation does not solve well.

title: Conversational Survey and Interview Intelligence Platform
summary: AI-led survey and interview system for adaptive questioning, multilingual understanding, response quality scoring, and conversation-to-structured-data pipelines.
business_hook: Improves research, customer feedback, public-sector engagement, and operational insight where static surveys produce shallow responses.

title: Freight and Logistics Tracking Intelligence
summary: Practical intelligence layer for shipment visibility, exception detection, reporting automation, performance analytics, and predictive risk flags in freight workflows.
business_hook: Targets expensive operational pain around missed deadlines, poor reporting, fragmented coordination, and margin risk.

title: AI-Native Enterprise Operating Systems
summary: Business operating layers where specialized AI agents support recurring workflows, coordination, documentation, review chains, and decision tracing.
business_hook: Compounds execution quality by making repeated company workflows more structured, monitorable, and easier to hand off.

title: High-Friction Data Access and Proxied Information Systems
summary: Products that make fragmented, expensive, permission-dependent, or hard-to-observe information more decision-ready through proxies, inference, confidence levels, and validation loops.
business_hook: Creates value where perfect data is unrealistic but better approximation and uncertainty communication can still improve decisions.

title: Sports Intelligence and Transfer Market Media Products
summary: Structured sports intelligence products that organize rumor ecosystems, tactical analysis, player tracking, and confidence scoring into repeatable fan-facing experiences.
business_hook: Productizes analysis rather than commentary by turning noisy sports information into trackable, trustable systems.

title: Nutrition, Satiation, and Consumption System Redesign
summary: Consumer and public-health exploration around serving-size logic, satiation-adjusted food framing, meal-pattern analysis, and more realistic nutrition communication.
business_hook: Identifies a market mismatch between how food is labeled and how people actually eat, decide, and feel full.
